validation.summary: On validation, the baseline user-item bias model is better by 0.0049 RMSE (0.9130 vs 0.9179) compared with the deep model.

test.summary: On test, the baseline user-item bias model is better by 0.0061 RMSE (0.9306 vs 0.9367) compared with the deep model.
